title.ko: 엽궐련; 궐련; 담배 연기 필터; 엽궐련 또는 궐련의 마우스피스; 담배 연기 필터 또는 마우스피스의 제조
title.en: CIGARS; CIGARETTES; TOBACCO SMOKE FILTERS; MOUTHPIECES OF CIGARS OR CIGARETTES; MANUFACTURE OF TOBACCO SMOKE FILTERS OR MOUTHPIECES
Cigars; Cigarettes
with special covers

title.ko: 마우스피스 또는 필터 팁이 있는 것
title.en: with mouthpieces or filter-tips
with lighting means
with extinguishers
with ash-retaining attachments, holders, or other equipment
Tobacco cartridges for pipes
Bands for cigars or cigarettes
Selection of materials, other than tobacco, suitable for smoking
Cigarettes specially adapted for simulated smoking devices
Cigarettes with integrated combustible heat sources, e.g. with carbonaceous heat sources

title.ko: 담배 연기 필터, 예. 필터 팁 또는 필터 작용을 하는 삽입편; 모의 흡연 장치에 특히 적합한 필터; 엽궐련 또는 궐련용 마우스피스
title.en: Tobacco smoke filters, e.g. filter tips or filtering inserts; Filters specially adapted for simulated smoking devices; Mouthpieces of cigars or cigarettes
Manufacture of tobacco smoke filters
Tobacco smoke filters characterised by their shape or structure
Use of materials for tobacco smoke filters

title.ko: 담체(carrier) 또는 주요 성분으로서의 유기물질의 사용(이온 교환물질의 사용 A24D 3/12)
title.en: of organic materials as carrier or major constituent (of ion exchange materials A24D0003120000)
of cellulose or cellulose derivatives
of ion exchange materials
of organic materials as additive (of ion exchange materials A24D0003120000)
of inorganic materials
Filters specially adapted for simulated smoking devices

title.ko: 엽궐련 또는 궐련의 마우스피스; 그것의 제조 (담배 필터의 제조 A24D3/02)
title.en: Mouthpieces of cigars or cigarettes; Manufacture thereof (manufacture of tobacco smoke filters A24D0003020000)
